examples: He bought the coffeepot at 6 dollars off the list price.
Order the lobster soup: dumplings served in a pungent, beet-red vegetable broth, steamed before your eyes in a glass contraption resembling a coffeepot.
Like nearly every work in this show, Manet's real interest was the brush mark of the trousers, tablecloth, lemon zest, vase, coffeepot and smudgy cat.
